global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a central offer highlighted.

elements.label: Purple gradient background

elements.label: Main offer headline
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Late-night deals available'.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent white text showing the price '€19.99' located below the offer details.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bold white button with the text 'Order now' positioned below the price.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in bold letters.

elements.label: Order now text
